originalTitle: Abu Dhabi’s Etihad to surpass pre-Iran War capacity without price cuts
summary: Airline had its planes grounded when fighting began but demand for transit through region has recovered
content: Airline had its planes grounded when fighting began but demand for transit through region has recovered
chineseTitle: 阿布扎比阿提哈德航空运力将在不降价的情况下超越伊朗战争前
chineseSummary: 战斗开始时，航空公司的飞机停飞，但通过该地区的运输需求已恢复
chineseContent: 战斗开始时，航空公司的飞机停飞，但通过该地区的运输需求已恢复
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
